chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A No.159 of 2021 Applicants: None for the applicants. Date of Order: 01.11.2021 O R D E R ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J:- Through instant revision application, the applicants have called in question the judgment and decree dated 17.1.2018 passed by learned trial Court in T.C Suit No. 02 of 2014, whereby the suit filed by the plaintiff/respondent was decreed. Against the said judgment and decree, an appeal was preferred by the applicants being Civil Appeal No.18 of 2018; however, the same was dismissed by learned Addl. District Judge, Khipro vide judgment dated 29.08.2019. The applicants have now attempted to re- open the case through this revision under Section 115 CPC. Previously, this matter was taken up on 2.4.2021, but nobody bothered to put appearance to assist this Court on the subject issue. Today no one is present for the applicants and no intimation is received. It appears from the record that after filing of this revision application, the applicants and their counsel have chosen to remain absent and have not come forward to even get the matter posted for hearing, which shows that perhaps the applicants have lost interest in these proceedings, therefore, I have gone through the record as available before me and found that there are concurrent finding available against the applicants, which needs no further indulgence of this court. However, this revision application is accordingly dismissed on account of non-prosecution. JUDGE *Hafiz Fahad*
